title: Monster Overcrise: The Blood Moon
description: Explore this world and find out what's strange... Fight various adversities and get food to survive!
body:
![Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Monster_Overcrise/BH_Monster_Overcrise_Header.webp)
![Overview](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Monster_Overcrise/BH_Monster_Overcrise_Overview.webp)
Face various adversities and explore the vast world of "Monster Overcrise: The Blood Moon" Uncover the mystery of this strange world and face formidable bosses! Furthermore, in this modpack you will have a very dark setting to make your gaming experience truly scary! Discover the mystery of "Monster Overcrise: The Blood Moon" and face various adversities!

 

**Markus' diary**

Hi, my name is Markus. Whoever is reading this letter should know that this world is in grave danger... I feel like I'm going crazy... Really disturbing things are happening in this world... There are tons of monsters walking around at night that as if that wasn't enough there's also a strange moon... It should be called "Blood Moon!?", I haven't eaten anything for days... I have to hurry up and get some food otherwise I'll die... If one day I die.. .I hope someone else can investigate better what happened... OH NO! They came to get me... If anyone reads this message... Be careful, this world is really strange! Good luck... Say hello to my family for me if you ever find them... I hope you find my family alive and not dead... Goodbye...

 

**Recommended memory allocation: 4-6 GBs.**
![Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Monster_Overcrise/BH_Monster_Overcrise_Features.webp)

                                                              110+ mods
                                                            Horror setting
                                                               Bosses
                                                        Lots of variety of mobs
                                                            and much more...
